mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your sense of entitlement is our priority. Get your special 'I Deserve It' credit card today!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-I stroll into a fancy restaurant, the kind where even the water tastes snobby. I flash my 'I Deserve It' card, expecting the royal treatment. But what do I get? The nerve, they tried to seat me by the bathroom! I threw a fit, demanded a personal apology from the chef, and threatened to leave a scathing Yelp review. They quickly ushered me to the VIP section, where I dined like the entitled king I am. And you know what? The food wasn't even that good, but the victory sure tasted sweet. Ah, the power of entitlement!
